Media

Media

Below is a list of selected media about my writing or work.

The list includes several podcast episodes. I am definitely more a writer than a speaker.

2022

Nudge podcast - Beware of Behaviour Science BS

2021

42courses - Behavioural Science & Evolutionary Biology

2020

Bloomberg on ergodicity economics

Todd Nief - Loss Aversion and Ergodicity Economics

A Bunch of BS - Knowing Our Limits, Expanding Our Knowledge

2018

Rationally Speaking with Julia Galef - A skeptical take on behavioral economics (post)

Between Worlds with Mike Walsh - Why humans should stop making making so many decisions

Challenging “Nudge Economics”: Reframing the market as a community of advantage: A conversation with Prof Robert Sugden.

Discussion of my fertility paper with Lionel Page at Forbes

2015

Discussion on my paper on conspicuous consumption and sexual selection in The Times, The Daily Mail, The Huffington Post and the The Wall Street Journal.
